conflictInsights.label: Defense supercycle
conflictInsights.desc: Patriot, F-35, THAAD, B-21 orders surging — RTX, LMT, NOC backlogs at multi-decade highs

conflictInsights.label: Oil above $90 (Brent)
conflictInsights.desc: Strait of Hormuz risk premium benefits North American producers — Canadian oil sands = no supply disruption risk

conflictInsights.label: Safe-haven bid
conflictInsights.desc: Physical gold, USD assets, and North American energy outperforming risk assets globally

conflictInsights.label: Naval buildup
conflictInsights.desc: US carrier group deployments accelerating — HII shipbuilding backlog extends to 2032

themes.label: Iran war premium
themes.desc: Active Middle East conflict driving defense stocks and oil to multi-year highs

themes.label: Oil price tailwind
themes.desc: Brent above $90 on Hormuz risk — Canadian oil sands benefit with zero supply exposure

themes.label: Defense supercycle
themes.desc: Iran + NATO 2% mandate = unprecedented multi-year weapon systems procurement wave

themes.label: Safe-haven bid
themes.desc: Gold, CAD energy, and North American assets outperforming on geopolitical uncertainty

themes.label: AI buildout intact
themes.desc: Enterprise AI spend accelerating despite geopolitical headwinds — infrastructure is sticky

themes.label: Healthcare resilient
themes.desc: GLP-1 + aging demographics = secular demand independent of conflict or recession cycles

themes.label: Rate-cut cycle
themes.desc: BoC & Fed easing — bonds and REITs positioned for revaluation as rates decline

themes.label: Tariff drag
themes.desc: US-China tariffs ongoing — favor domestically-focused businesses and Canadian names

recommendations.name: Berkshire Hathaway B
recommendations.thesis: Sitting on $330B+ cash amid tariff volatility — Buffett deploys aggressively in corrections. Natural market hedge with zero dividend drag. Complements tech-heavy TFSA with value ballast.

recommendations.name: Visa
recommendations.thesis: Digital payments toll-road untouched by tariffs. Global cross-border volume growing as travel rebounds. Asset-light royalty model: $0.001 per transaction × billions of transactions = immense free cash flow.

recommendations.name: Intuitive Surgical
recommendations.thesis: 7,000+ da Vinci robotic systems installed creates razor/blade recurring revenue. New Ion bronchoscopy expanding TAM. Secular shift to minimally invasive surgery = 20-year compounding runway.

recommendations.name: Novo Nordisk
recommendations.thesis: GLP-1 peer to your LLY at a cheaper valuation. Ozempic/Wegovy demand still exceeds supply. Oral semaglutide + next-gen CagriSema data due in 2026. Portfolio: LLY + NVO = dual GLP-1 coverage.

recommendations.name: ARM Holdings
recommendations.thesis: CPU architecture royalty on every advanced chip. Powers all Apple silicon, Nvidia data center CPUs, and AI edge devices. Scales to $100B revenue with zero manufacturing risk — the ultimate AI leverage play.

recommendations.name: Axon Enterprise
recommendations.thesis: AI law enforcement platform (Taser + cameras + Evidence.com SaaS). Government contracts = recession-proof revenue. International expansion accelerating amid global security concerns. Zero dividend = pure TFSA compounder.

recommendations.name: Costco Wholesale
recommendations.thesis: Membership model is recession-proof — members don't cancel during downturns, they shop more. International expansion accelerating. Tariff pressure minimal as private-label pricing power offsets costs.

recommendations.name: RTX Corporation
recommendations.thesis: Iran conflict has made RTX's Patriot missile systems the single most in-demand air defense platform on earth — restocking demand from the US, Israel, Gulf states, and NATO allies extends the Patriot backlog past 2031. Pratt & Whitney (F-35 engines) at maximum production capacity. Raytheon munitions lines running at war-footing output. NATO 2% GDP commitment adds a decade-long structural layer on top of the immediate Middle East demand surge.

recommendations.name: Enbridge
recommendations.thesis: Largest North American pipeline — 30% of US crude flows through Enbridge's network. Iran conflict + Strait of Hormuz risk premium has elevated oil prices, improving Canadian oil sands economics and driving higher throughput on Enbridge's lines. 7% dividend eligible for Canadian dividend tax credit (0% WHT in TFSA). 29 consecutive years of dividend growth. Rate-regulated cash flows = recession-resistant income regardless of oil price direction.

recommendations.name: Lockheed Martin
recommendations.thesis: Iran conflict has driven F-35 fighter orders and THAAD missile defense deployments to record levels — Lockheed is the only Western supplier of operational 5th-generation stealth aircraft. Hellfire, JASSM, and JAGM missile inventories are being rebuilt at accelerated rates to replenish allied stockpiles. $170B+ backlog = 3+ years of revenue locked in. Cost-plus government contracts protect margins regardless of input inflation. 2.8% dividend in RRSP = 0% WHT under Canada-US treaty.

recommendations.name: Northrop Grumman
recommendations.thesis: B-21 Raider stealth bomber — the only new strategic bomber in 50 years — is entering full-rate production as Iran escalation accelerates Pentagon urgency for long-range strike capability. Sole-source contractor on the Sentinel ICBM (nuclear triad modernization), Columbia-class submarine weapons systems, and Ground-Based Midcourse Defense upgrade. Near-zero foreign competition on any of these programs. Backlog visibility extends to 2033.

recommendations.name: Suncor Energy
recommendations.thesis: Iran conflict + Strait of Hormuz supply risk has pushed Brent crude above $90 — Suncor's Alberta oil sands produce ~750,000 bbl/day with zero Middle East exposure, making it the safest large-cap oil bet in a geopolitical crisis. Trading at a steep discount to US oil majors on free cash flow yield. CAD-listed (TSX) = no US withholding tax in TFSA and eligible for the Canadian dividend tax credit. Has repurchased 25%+ of shares outstanding since 2020.

recommendations.name: iShares S&P/TSX Capped Energy ETF
recommendations.thesis: Diversified basket of Canadian oil producers and pipelines — CNQ, SU, CVE, TOU, MEG — all benefiting from Iran-driven oil price elevation with zero Strait of Hormuz supply risk. CAD-listed on TSX = 0% withholding tax in TFSA. Lower single-stock risk than owning individual producers. Capitalizes on the structural premium North American oil commands when Middle East supply routes are threatened.

recommendations.name: Huntington Ingalls Industries
recommendations.thesis: The US Navy's sole builder of nuclear-powered aircraft carriers and one of only two submarine constructors. Strait of Hormuz tensions and Iran conflict are driving accelerated carrier group deployments and a multi-year naval expansion program — the Navy's 2026 shipbuilding budget is the largest since the Cold War. No foreign competition for these contracts. Backlogs extend to 2032. Steady dividend grower with a uniquely captive government customer.

recommendations.name: MercadoLibre
recommendations.thesis: Latin America's Amazon + PayPal combined. 220M+ users, 50M+ credit card holders. Tariff war benefits regional champions vs global platforms. Brazil and Mexico economies more insulated from US-China tensions.

recommendations.name: iShares MSCI India ETF
recommendations.thesis: India = China replacement manufacturing hub. Apple, Samsung shifting production. 1.4B population, median age 28, 7%+ GDP growth. Modi infrastructure boom. Demographics + manufacturing shift = generational opportunity.

recommendations.name: Vanguard European ETF
recommendations.thesis: European stocks at 40-year discount to US on P/E. Defense spending surge (NATO commitment). ECB cutting rates faster than Fed. Deep diversification away from your US concentration.

recommendations.name: iShares MSCI Japan ETF
recommendations.thesis: Tokyo Stock Exchange governance reforms forcing buybacks + ROE improvement. Yen weakness creates value for CAD investors. Buffett's Japan trading house bets validated. Cheap valuations uncorrelated to US tariff drama.

recommendations.name: iShares 20+ Year Treasury Bond
recommendations.thesis: If Fed cuts 2-3x in 2026 amid tariff slowdown, long-duration bonds capture 15-25% capital gain. High 4%+ yield provides carry while waiting. Contrarian — most investors are underweight duration entering a rate-cut cycle.

recommendations.name: BMO Aggregate Bond ETF
recommendations.thesis: As Bank of Canada continues rate-cut cycle, bond prices rise. Canadian aggregate bonds: zero currency risk, no WHT. Portfolio ballast — rises when equities fall. Reduces overall portfolio volatility.

recommendations.name: iShares Canadian REIT ETF
recommendations.thesis: Canadian REITs deeply oversold from rate cycle. As BoC cuts rates, cap rate compression lifts valuations. Canadian-listed = no WHT in TFSA. Diversified industrial, retail, and residential REIT exposure.

recommendations.name: Walmart
recommendations.thesis: Walmart has become an ad-tech company: $4B+ advertising revenue growing 50% YoY. Flipkart + international. Tariff-resilient: US supply chain more diversified than Target or Amazon peers.

recommendations.name: Shopify
recommendations.thesis: Canadian fintech/commerce platform powering 10%+ of US e-commerce. AI tools (Sidekick) driving merchant GMV growth. Freed from logistics. Expanding into B2B commerce globally. Zero dividend = pure tax-free TFSA growth.

recommendations.name: Accenture
recommendations.thesis: Every Fortune 500 firm needs AI implementation. Accenture's AI practice growing 40%+ YoY — $3B+ annual revenue. Captures 5-15% of every enterprise AI budget as the execution layer regardless of which model wins.

recommendations.name: Vanguard Dividend Appreciation ETF
recommendations.thesis: Companies growing dividends 10+ consecutive years: Visa, Microsoft, J&J, UnitedHealth. Quality factor in disguise — these firms have durable moats. RRSP: 0% WHT. Outperforms in drawdowns. MER 0.06%.
